author: fix-pr1151
content: Plan: (1) Need user to run 'git merge origin/dynamic-test-durations' since merge is blocked by hooks. (2) Add .test_durations_group_* and .test_durations_cached to .gitignore. (3) Gate conftest.py pytest_sessionfinish on GITHUB_ACTIONS env var so duration files aren't written locally. (4) Run pre-commit.
